title: European Commission Brings Clarity on ReFuelEU Aviation Implementation
content: The European Commission has published a report assessing the development of the EU sustainable aviation fuels (SAF) market and evaluating potential improvements to the SAF flexibility mechanism. To support the gradual scale-up of SAF production, a flexibility mechanism allows fuel suppliers to average SAF blending obligations across EU airports until 2035. The report concludes that this mechanism, combined with the ongoing expansion of SAF production capacity in the EU, is already driving progress toward achieving SAF targets. The report also highlights key areas for improvement, including enhancing traceability and transparency in SAF transactions, reducing administrative burdens, and simplifying reporting obligations for fuel suppliers and airlines.
author: Analysts Account
